mediaStylePrefix: live action, clinical midnight thriller photography with hard edge practicals and cool city spill carving subjects out of shadow.

frames.narrativeBeat: Nova watches the district from the rooftop ledge before the alert lands.
frames.actionSummary: Nova scans the district from the rooftop ledge.
frames.sourceText: On the rooftop, Nova scans the district before the pager starts to vibrate.

background.visible_description: the surveillance district skyline blinking beyond the ledge

directing.dramatic_purpose: establish the watch position before the warning lands
directing.beat_turn: The silence is about to break
directing.viewer_knowledge_delta: Nova is exposed on the roof with no cover
directing.tension_source: She is waiting for a signal that does not come fast enough
directing.camera_motivation: Hold the whole roof to expose how alone she is
directing.background_life: tower beacons pulse across the skyline

frames.narrativeBeat: The pager vibrates and Nova reads the warning.
frames.actionSummary: Nova pulls the pager from her coat and reads the alert.
frames.sourceText: The pager vibrates in Nova's hand and she mutters that they are early.

background.visible_description: the surveillance district skyline blinking beyond the ledge

directing.dramatic_purpose: pivot from surveillance into immediate threat
directing.beat_turn: Nova understands the watchers are moving early
directing.viewer_knowledge_delta: The warning has arrived too late to feel safe
directing.power_dynamic: The unseen watchers hold the tempo
directing.tension_source: The pager compresses the time Nova has left
directing.camera_motivation: Push toward the pager as the warning lands
directing.movement_motivation: Let Nova's hands absorb the shock of the alert
directing.background_life: the skyline keeps flashing behind the message

frames.narrativeBeat: Nova reaches the stairwell landing where Rafe is already waiting.
frames.actionSummary: Nova reaches the landing and meets Rafe under the exit glow.
frames.sourceText: Nova hits the stairwell landing and finds Rafe waiting in the spill from the exit door.

background.visible_description: the open exit door bleeding streetlight down the stairwell core
background.background_sound: street rumble filtering down the shaft

directing.dramatic_purpose: land the contact and compress the available space
directing.beat_turn: Rafe sees Nova already carrying the warning
directing.viewer_knowledge_delta: The meet is already in motion before either speaks
directing.power_dynamic: Rafe is positioned to command the exit
directing.tension_source: They have no private space left to talk
directing.camera_motivation: Keep both bodies visible to show the handoff geometry
directing.background_life: streetlight spills and traffic echoes down the stair core

frames.narrativeBeat: Rafe leans in, forces the decision, and sends Nova toward the exit.
frames.actionSummary: Rafe leans in and drives Nova toward the exit.
frames.sourceText: Rafe leans in and tells Nova to move before the stairwell seals behind them.

background.visible_description: the open exit door bleeding streetlight down the stairwell core
background.background_sound: street rumble filtering down the shaft

directing.dramatic_purpose: seal the handoff with urgency and force movement
directing.beat_turn: Rafe turns the warning into an exit command
directing.viewer_knowledge_delta: There is no time left to plan
directing.power_dynamic: Rafe takes command of the escape route
directing.tension_source: The stairwell can be cut off at any second
directing.camera_motivation: Push in to make the order feel inescapable
directing.movement_motivation: Carry Nova's reaction toward the exit line
directing.movement_path: landing rail toward the exit door
directing.background_life: streetlight pulses behind them while the fixture buzzes
